gurindervir-singh.name: Gurindervir Singh
gurindervir-singh.consistencyNote: National Record holder; consistent sub-10.2 performer

murali-sreeshankar.name: Murali Sreeshankar
murali-sreeshankar.consistencyNote: Personal best 8.41m (Indian NR: 8.42m held by Jeswin Aldrin); CWG silver & Asian Games silver

neeraj-chopra.name: Neeraj Chopra
neeraj-chopra.consistencyNote: Most throws fall between 85m–89m; first Indian to throw 90m+ (May 2025)

postsContent.author: Neeraj Chopra
postsContent.text: Ready for Commonwealth Games 2026! Glasgow, here we come 🏆

postsContent.author: Neeraj Chopra
postsContent.text: Training in perfect conditions today. Every session counts. 💪

postsContent.author: Neeraj Chopra
postsContent.text: Grateful for the support from all Indian fans. You fuel my motivation!

parul-chaudhary.name: Parul Chaudhary
parul-chaudhary.consistencyNote: National Record holder in 3000mSC and 5000m; Asian Games gold (5000m) and silver (3000mSC)

pooja-singh.name: Pooja Singh
pooja-singh.consistencyNote: Indian women's high jump national record holder (1.93m); U20 Asian Athletics C'ship gold 2026

priyanka-goswami.name: Priyanka Goswami
priyanka-goswami.consistencyNote: First Indian woman to win CWG race walk medal; two-time Olympian; national record holder

sarvesh-kushare.name: Sarvesh Kushare
sarvesh-kushare.consistencyNote: First Indian high jumper to reach World Athletics Championships final (2025); five-time national champion

tejaswin-shankar.name: Tejaswin Shankar
tejaswin-shankar.consistencyNote: India's best-ever decathlete; first to cross 8000 pts (2026); Asian Games silver and 2x Asian C'ship medalist
